{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":448853,"duration_api_ms":317984,"ttft_ms":2034,"ttft_stream_ms":1430,"time_to_request_ms":172,"num_turns":44,"result":"Step 3(gif-placement-integration) 완료했습니다.

- `src/fabric/placeImageOrGif.js`에 `createImageOrAnimatedGifObject` 공용 함수를 만들어 GIF 판별 로직을 한 곳에 모으고, `canvasAssetPlacement.js`와 `ImageUploadButton.jsx` 둘 다 이 함수만 호출하도록 통합했습니다.
- `ImageUploadButton.jsx`는 ADR-5대로 base64 직접 삽입 방식을 걷어내고 IndexedDB(`assetStorage.saveAsset`) 경로로 전환했습니다.
- `npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test`(144개 테스트 전부 통과) 확인 후 커밋했습니다.
- `docs/plan/animated-gif-support/steps/index.json` 갱신, 사람용 리포트(`reports/step3-gif-placement-integration.md`) 작성 완료.

다음은 step 4(gif-persistence) — 저장/새로고침 후에도 애니메이션이 유지되는지 마무리 검증입니다.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"390a61bf-ea7f-49be-af6d-0ecaab825ada","total_cost_usd":1.9007342999999994,"usage":{"input_tokens":6085,"cache_creation_input_tokens":93520,"cache_read_input_tokens":2926531,"output_tokens":28554,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":93520,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":393,"cache_read_input_tokens":114066,"cache_creation_input_tokens":938,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":938},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":14975,"outputTokens":23,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.015090000000000001,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-sonnet-5":{"inputTokens":6085,"outputTokens":28554,"cacheReadInputTokens":2926531,"cacheCreationInputTokens":93520,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":1.8856442999999996,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"64a82c6a-1f01-4a9d-90a6-28e3cfeddae8"}
